Dialog.name: MSG_003_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Everyone calls me Joe, Aigis-senpai, so you can just—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I would like to ask you something, Kiyoshi-san. Do you mind?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Kiyoshi-san... Do you feel lonely when you are by yourself?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Your grandmother said that she's lonely, because she has nobody else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Why don't you visit your grandmother more often?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}If you are her relative, you may have the power to alleviate her loneliness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I mean, I am her grandson, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}Look, I don't need a lecture from you, alright? It's none of your business, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Kiyoshi-san, have you ever considered what it means to live?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Personally... I think the bonds between people are what's most important.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}That's what your grandmother is slowly losing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}"To live"? Are you kidding? No one actually talks like that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}What more do you need outta life than to have a blast?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}I mean, you're happy when you're having fun, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}So, hell yeah! We're alive to have a good time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}So, whaddaya say, Aigis-senpai? If you got time, why don't we—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 5 21 0 2}What, so you were just tryin' to play me!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}I wonder why... hearing you reassure me that way is... well...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Boyfriend... A term that is used when one is in a mutually romantic relationship, correct?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}If I assume you are my boyfriend... My boyfriend...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}{f 5 13 22 15 7}Hm? What is this...? It feels strange to phrase it like that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}The more time I spend with you, the more I discover that I don't understand...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}But, when I ask myself why I'm not alive...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}But at the same time, I feel extremely lucky.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}I would even say I'm more fortunate than others, despite not being human myself...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}After all, you are very important to me, and I get to be by your side.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}It's strange how two conflicting feelings can coexist...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis seems to be deep in thought...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}My feelings towards Kiyoshi-san are... unusually harsh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}Kiyoshi-san has warm, soft hands to embrace those precious to him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
